title: Elysium Spa Natural Lavender Epsom Salts 1Kg
features: THERAPEUTIC BATH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 1kg
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins. Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle, helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it. Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep. Ready to use, fragranced with lavender oil and resealable bag 1kg. Ingredients Magnesium sulphate, Parfum, Linalool, Citronellol, Benzyl Benzoate. Directions Add to bath water Safety Warning May cause skin irritation or allergic reactions in some individuals. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not ingest. Always use in a bathtub with non-slip surfaces. Keep out of reach of children. See more
